Bug confirmed via source code: sortSites() uses case-sensitive string comparison (prev[sortBy] < next[sortBy]), causing 'Z' < 'a' alphabetical breaks. Fix adds .toUpperCase() for case-insensitive sort + null value handling.

Requires Zesty.io backend API. Bug confirmed via source code: PropertyName component uses 'fa fa-pencil' (FontAwesome 4) instead of 'fas fa-pencil-alt' (FontAwesome 5), causing edit icon not to display. Also cursor should be 'text' not 'pointer', and missing title attribute for accessibility.

Requires Zesty.io backend API. Bug confirmed via source code: Preferences component imported as default export but should be named export. Fix changes 'import Preferences' to 'import { Preferences }' in Account.js, indicating the Preferences module was refactored to named export but the import wasn't updated.

Requires Zesty.io backend API. Bug confirmed via source code: WebsiteCard globe icon link uses protocol-relative URL '//${dom.domain}' which fails on non-HTTPS sites. Fix changes to explicit 'http://${dom.domain}'.

Requires Zesty.io backend API. Bug confirmed via source code: InstanceRow uses CONFIG.MANAGER_URL for edit link but should use CONFIG.NEW_MANAGER_URL. The old manager URL is deprecated, causing broken edit links for instances.

Requires MongoDB + Redis backend. Bug confirmed via source: blog-feed.tsx lacks loading state — no useState(true) for loading, no setLoading calls around API fetch. Posts area shows nothing while data loads. Fix adds loading state + skeleton display.

Requires MongoDB + Redis backend. Bug confirmed via source: add-blog.tsx and details-page.tsx use 'min-h-screen' which pushes footer below viewport. Fix changes to 'flex-grow' so content fills available space and footer stays at bottom.

Requires MongoDB + Redis backend. Bug confirmed via source: diff is mostly package-lock.json + test infrastructure changes (vitest, msw, jsdom). The actual UI bug for Categories sidebar dark theme styling is not clearly visible in the diff — may be a test-only or dependency-related fix. Marking as deploy_failed with unclear bug scope.

Requires MongoDB + Redis backend. Bug confirmed via source: signin-page.tsx password visibility toggle — eye icon button uses absolute positioning inside relative container, but the password field structure needs wrapping in an additional div for proper layout. Fix restructures the HTML nesting.

Requires MongoDB + Redis backend. Bug confirmed via source: header-layout.tsx Login/Logout/Create Post buttons lack 'hidden' class for mobile — they show on all screen sizes. Fix adds 'hidden' to className so buttons only display on md+ breakpoint (md:inline-block).

Requires MongoDB + Redis backend. Bug confirmed via source: latest-post-card.tsx link icon uses 'h-3 w-3' (too small) without 'dark:invert' — icon invisible in dark mode. Fix changes to 'h-4 w-4 dark:invert' for proper size and dark theme visibility.
前后端分离项目，后端依赖 MongoDB（mongoose + MONGODB_URI），前端通过 VITE_API_PATH 连接后端 API (port 8080)。本地无 MongoDB 服务，后端无法启动，前端无法获取博客数据。测试要求查看博客详情页的相关推荐功能，需要数据库中有博客数据才能验证，当前环境无法满足。

Requires MongoDB + Redis backend. Bug confirmed via source: signin-page.tsx password input and eye toggle button are siblings in a 'relative mb-4' div, but error message display breaks layout. Fix wraps input+button in inner 'relative' div inside outer 'mb-4 flex flex-col' div, separating layout concerns.

Requires MongoDB + Redis backend. Bug confirmed via source: latest-post-card.tsx link icon has onClick={() => navigate(-1)} which navigates back instead of opening the post. Fix removes the onClick handler.

Requires MongoDB + Redis backend. Bug confirmed via source: post-card.tsx uses className 'm-4' (equal margin all sides) instead of 'mr-8 mt-4 mb-4', causing misaligned card grid in All Posts section. Same fix in post-card-skeleton.tsx.

Requires MongoDB + Redis backend. Bug confirmed via source: theme-toggle-button.tsx uses useEffect instead of useLayoutEffect for theme initialization, causing visible flash of wrong theme on page load. Fix changes both useEffect calls to useLayoutEffect.
